template.topStrip: dark charcoal strip, full width across text zone, compact white uppercase context text
template.mainBlock: premium yellow-to-gold gradient hook bar, thin black keyline, ultra-bold black condensed uppercase text (not flat neon yellow)
template.ctaBlock: red urgency strip directly below main block with short white uppercase CTA text
template.supportBadge: single circular badge near lower boundary between text zone and character/support-visual zone

variantSystem.A: Channel Match only: same dark / yellow-gold / red strip system as real uploads; standard composition for this layout family.
